prompt: Identify the component or condition shown, and name the visible defect cues.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Visual acceptance, part of the Assembly & Fabrication scope. The observed field condition is: scratch/dent classification vs. boundary samples (ID against acceptance standard photos). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: site visual standards, AIAG PPAP.
title: Identification: Visual acceptance (production floor)
